title: Theobroma mariae
taxonomy: Theobroma mariae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, order Malvales, and clade Rosids. It belongs to the genus Theobroma, which also includes the famous cacao tree (Theobroma cacao). Further classification includes the tribe Theobromeae, subtribe Theobrominae, and the subfamily Dombreoideae. Theobroma mariae is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a close relative of Theobroma cacao, with which it shares similarities in its growth habits and leaf morphology.
